titleStmt.title: SII 16.201: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 201. (A.R. No. 161 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPUR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall, left of entrance, of the antarāḷa-maṇḍapa in the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Māgha śu. 7, corresponding to 1555 A.D., January 29.

It records a gift of the various toll incomes due from the 18 villages, viz., Mārakapuram, Channavaram, Koṇḍāpuram, Yāchavaram, Rāyavaram, Gōṅguladinna, Tarnumbāḍu, Sūrēpalli, Vānālapuram, Chanāreḍḍipalle, Gaṅgireḍḍipalle, Kōrevānipalle, Meḍiśeṭṭipalle, Gollapalle, Jammuladinna, Tellaṁbāḍu, Kamalāpuram and Koṇḍapalli to god Chennakēśava by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Māḍrāju Nārappadēva-mahārāju, son of Aubhaḷayyadēva-mahārāju, grandson of Mahāmaṇdalēśvara Māḍrāju Śiṅgarayyadēvamahārāju, of Kāśyapa-gōta and Sūrya-vaṁs11a, and nephew of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju of Ātrēya-gōtra and Sōma-vaṁs11a. The gift villages are said to be situated in Kochcherlakōṭa-sīma which was held by the donor as nāyaṅkara from the king. Records in addition that the lañjasuṅkham (levy on prostitutes) collected during the festivals at Mārakāpuram was also made over to the temple and that five out of every six dishes of offerings to the deity, were to be made over to the satra (feeding house) for feeding paradēśi brāhmaṇas of the smārtta sect, the sixth dish being the share of the sthānikas, the adhikāris and the karaṇas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmatkēśavadēvasya mārakāpuravāsinaḥ . catu¨rdaśānāṁ lōkānāṁ prabhō¨rdīvyati śāsanaṁ . svasti śrī
jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1476 Agunaneṭi Ānaṁdasaṁvatsara māgha śu 7 lu . śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanā
rūḍhulai pṛthvisāṁmrāṁjyaṁbu sēyucuṁnuṁḍaṁgānu Akhilāṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁḍanāyaku laina śrīmārakāpura
ṁ caṁnnakēśavarāyala śrīpādālaku . sūryavaṁśōdbhavulaina kāśyapagōtṛlaina śrīmanmahā maṁḍalēśvara māḍrāju śiṁgarayya
dēvamahārājuluṁgāriki pautṛluṁnnu . Avubhaḷayyadēva mahārājuluṁgāriki putṛluṁnnu . sōmavaṁśōdbhavulaina Ātrēyagō
tṛlaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju tirumalayya dēvamahārājulaṁgāriki mēna Alluṁḍunnu AIna śrīmaṁ
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara māḍrāju nārappadēva mahārājuluṁgāru daṁḍaṁ sama¨rppiṁci yiccina suṁkhadha¨rma śāsanaṁ . sadāśi
va mahārāyalu mā nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina kocce¨rlakōṭaśīmalōnu cannarāyalaku sāgivaccē grāmālu mārakapuraṁ cannavaraṁ
koṁḍāpuraṁ yācavaraṁ rāyavaraṁ gōṁguladinna ta¨rnuṁbāḍu sūrēpali vānāla puraṁ canāreḍḍipalle gaṁgireḍḍipalle korevānipalle mēḍiśeṭṭipalle gollapalle
jaṁmuladinna tellaṁbāḍu kamaḷāpuraṁ koṁḍapalli yī grāmāla mā nagaraki rāvalaśina suṁkha sthāvarālu yillari pullari gānugari maggari mu
drāyaṁ Aṁdiśāṁti suṁkhaṁ yiṁduvalla rāvalaśina rokhaṁ I tathātithi puṇyakālamaṁdu sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakamugānu
dhāravōśi Istimigāna Iṁdulavalna Āyaparucina rokhaṁ ghaṭṭi va ga 150 Ivi Akṣarālānu nūṭayābhayi varahālakuṁnnu Āragiṁppuku kaṭṭaḍa
vivaraṁ dina 1 vokaṁṭi pāṁtarūkalu Ö5 AIdurūkalaku kālakrayāna dinaṁ taḷike 1 ki biyyaṁ 07 kuṁcaṁ lekhanu Ayina taḷikelu dinamu 1 ki taḷikelu 6 Ā
ru taḷikela coppuna nāgarāju Avasaraṁ kaṭaḍaśēstimigāna I dha¨rmaśāsanānaku yevvaru tappiri tama tallidaṁḍrādulanu gōbrāṁhmalanu vāraṇāśilōnu
vadiyiṁcina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . yī polivōṭu mārakāpuraṁ staḷāna yettina [polige .] kūrakaṭṭalu majjiga satrānaku yistimi tiruṇālalōnu mārakāpu
raṁ staḷāna laṁjasuṁkhamu yistimi kaṭṭaḍa Ayina paḷlelu 6 kisthānaṁvāru Atikārikaraṇālaku paḷemu vokaṭigāka nilicni Ayidu paḷelu
smā¨rtulaina paradēśibrāṁhmalaku prasādapaḍi satraṁbugāṁ beṭṭiṁccēdi .
Digital edition of SII 16.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
